transcript:
Speaker A (Human): Enakkum nalla communication skills irukkum. Naan hard work panna romba pidikkum. [I also have good communication skills. I like to work hard very much.]
Speaker B (AI): Good start. Say, "I have good communication skills and I like to work hard." Try again.
Speaker A (Human): I have good communication skills and I like to work hard.
Speaker B (AI): Much better. Now tell me about a time you handled pressure.
Speaker A (Human): I stayed dee-TER-mined and I finished the project on time.
Speaker B (AI): Almost there. It's dih-TUR-mind. Say it once.
Speaker A (Human): I stayed dee-TER-mined and I finished the project within time.
Speaker B (AI): Exactly. You're getting sharper every round.
Speaker A (Human): Ippo interview-ku enakku bayame illa. SpeakX-oda practice pannithaan en confidence-um adhigamaayiduchu, en English-um romba improve aayiduchu. Confidence, pronunciation, illai English, yedhaavadhu problem irundhaalum, SpeakX-oda thinamum 15 minutes practice pannunga. AI-la unga result paarkunga. Mudhala 20 questions free. [Now I have no fear of interviews. Practicing with SpeakX has increased my confidence and improved my English a lot. Whether it's confidence, pronunciation, or English, if you have any problem, practice with SpeakX for 15 minutes daily. See your results in AI. First 20 questions free.]
Speaker C (Voiceover): Download SpeakX, now available on Play Store and App Store.
on_screen_text: Enakku nalla communication skills irukku [I have good communication skills] / naan hard work panna romba pidikkum [I like to work hard very much] / Good start / say / I have good communication skills and I like to work hard / try again / much better / Now tell me about a time you handled pressure / I stayed dee-TER-mined and I finished the project on time / almost there / it's dih-TUR-mind / say it once / exactly / You're getting sharper every round / Ippo interview-ku enakku bayame illa [Now I have no fear of interviews] / SpeakX-oda practice pannithaan [Only by practicing with SpeakX] / confidence-um adhigamaayiduchu [confidence has also increased] / English-um romba improve aayiduchu [English has also improved a lot] / CONFIDENCE / PRONUNCIATION / ENGLISH / yedhaavadhu problem [any problem] / SpeakX-oda thinamum 15 minutes practice pannunga [practice 15 minutes daily with SpeakX] / AI-la unga result paarkunga [see your results in AI] / 20 questions free / Download SpeakX, now available on Play Store and App Store
summary: A Tamil-speaking user practices English interview skills with an AI avatar on the SpeakX app, receiving real-time grammar and pronunciation corrections. The user shares how the app boosted his confidence and invites viewers to try 20 free questions on SpeakX.
